channel.title: Agent on Junho Lee
channel.description: Recent content in Agent on Junho Lee

item.title: Using Korean Legal Data for AI Agent Development via Beopmang API
item.description: Parsing raw legal XML means broken table structures and half a day lost on preprocessing. Beopmang is an API that delivers pre-cleaned JSON, solving that problem upfront.

item.title: Building an Organic AI Collaboration Flow from Planning to Visualization
item.description: How assigning Claude, Perplexity, and NotebookLM to distinct stages of lecture planning changes the workflow. The point is not using more tools but knowing which tool fits which stage.
